message:
feat(distributed): add DistributedTlsBundle helpers and DistributedHttpClient (wa-1u55z)

Add production-ready asupersync TLS bridge methods to DistributedTlsBundle:
- acceptor() returns asupersync::tls::TlsAcceptor from server config
- connector() returns asupersync::tls::TlsConnector from client config

Add DistributedHttpClient wrapper around asupersync::http for node-to-node
communication without reqwest dependency.

Add 7 verification tests: bundle handshake, mTLS handshake, clone safety,
HTTP client creation, local HTTP GET, bidirectional TLS exchange, large
payload throughput.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
